name: Sunresin New Materials Co., Ltd.
summary: Sunresin New Materials Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of specialty resins in China and internationally. The company offers ion exchange, chelating, solid phase synthesis, adsorbent, and chromatography resins; and SEPSOLUT equipment and enzyme carriers. Its products are used in food and beverage, pharmaceutical, herbal extraction, enzyme immobilization, chromatography media, membrane caustic soda, solid-phase peptide synthesis, hydrometallurgy, mining, biodiesel purification, waste water and reuse, aquarium treatment, industrial and municipal water treatment chemicals, and SEPSOLUT ion exchange system and solutions. Sunresin New Materials Co., Ltd. is headquartered in Xi'an, China.
